recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the professor say about your draft?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know why I changed the topic.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your roommate ever return your jacket?
recent_60_samples.answer: He found out it was in his closet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Mariana ask you after class?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether the weekend trip was finally cancelled.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you get to class late today?
recent_60_samples.answer: My alarm did not ring this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you handed in your lab report?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not written the final conclusion section yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just transferred here this semester.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I get a campus parking permit now?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Hector loved the cafe you mentioned.
recent_60_samples.answer: Did you try their lunch special too?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you free to grab coffee later?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have a tough chemistry quiz later this afternoon.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you walk to campus today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I rode the old bike that my roommate had lent me yesterday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Can you tell me about your weekend trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: We hiked the scenic trail that winds along the far northern ridge.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Harold ask you for his notebook?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've put it back in his locker.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm starving after that long lecture.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you want to grab lunch first?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Olivia tell you about the change?
recent_60_samples.answer: I think she moved it to next week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Mariana mention the new deadline?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wanted to know whether the deadline was extended.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you register for the writing workshop?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't signed up for the workshop yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Emma tell you the gym hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked if the new gym opens before eight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Julian give you the laptop back?
recent_60_samples.answer: Julian returned the laptop that he had borrowed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You should try the tutoring center sometime.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I sign up for free tutoring?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you see the new printer in the lab?
recent_60_samples.answer: Your brand new color printer was installed by the campus support staff.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Hector ask you about the gym?
recent_60_samples.answer: Hector wondered when the newly renovated gym would open this coming fall.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you make it to class on time?
recent_60_samples.answer: I missed the early bus this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: There's a study group forming for chemistry.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I sign up for it?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ever hear back about the lab hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wanted to know whether the lab opens early.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you ready to hand in the assignment?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't finished the final lab report yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ever return those library books?
recent_60_samples.answer: I returned the books that I'd borrowed last week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I still need to get my ID badge.
recent_60_samples.answer: You can pick up your badge at the front desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the chemistry lecture got rescheduled.
recent_60_samples.answer: The lecture was moved to the bigger lecture hall.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you check on the deadline?
recent_60_samples.answer: I tried to find out when the deadline was.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I wasn't sure if I could come along.
recent_60_samples.answer: You're welcome to join us for the trip.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the advisor explain your credit situation?
recent_60_samples.answer: He had to figure out which of the classes I dropped still counted.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you seen my notebook anywhere?
recent_60_samples.answer: I left my notebook in the library.

recent_60_samples.prompt: There's an open seat next to me.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you want to sit with us?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get the room change notice?
recent_60_samples.answer: I needed to find out where the seminar met.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you heading to the gym later?
recent_60_samples.answer: I don't think the gym is open yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm not sure who to ask about transferring.
recent_60_samples.answer: You should talk to the advisor who handles transfers.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the library is staying open longer.
recent_60_samples.answer: The library hours were extended for final exams.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you signed up for the writing workshop?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've already signed up for the writing workshop.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find out the gym schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the new gym opens before eight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I can't find the textbook on the shelves.
recent_60_samples.answer: I wonder if the bookstore still has the textbook.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear back about your lab results?
recent_60_samples.answer: I returned the bike that my roommate had lent me last week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you free after lunch today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have a meeting with my advisor.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your package ever show up?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not checked the mailroom yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know what Mariana asked you?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if the gym closed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sort out your schedule problem?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the late class still counts.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to anyone about the concert?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wondered when the spring concert begins.

recent_60_samples.prompt: There's an open spot on the trip.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know how much it costs?

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the chemistry section changed rooms.
recent_60_samples.answer: The class was moved to the science building.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you started your group project?
recent_60_samples.answer: We have not divided the tasks yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you eat anything this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: I grabbed a bagel near the dorm.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your friend dropped this off for you.
recent_60_samples.answer: He returned the charger that I lent him.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you heading out somewhere right now?
recent_60_samples.answer: I am going to the campus bookstore.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Is your roommate around this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: She left for the airport very early.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the librarian tell you?
recent_60_samples.answer: The journals are kept on the third floor.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your tutor said you stopped by her office.
recent_60_samples.answer: I needed to find out my final grade.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you figure out the lab hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: He asked if the lab opens before nine.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you been to the library lately?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out the library closes at midnight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just transferred here this semester.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know where the writing center is?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Is your lab report ready to turn in?
recent_60_samples.answer: I did not finish the conclusion section.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you met the new professor yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: My friend recommended the course that he teaches.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I picked up the concert tickets for us.
recent_60_samples.answer: The seats near the front sold out fast.
